signaling.c(3) Library Functions Manual signaling.c(3)

NAME

signaling.c

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct find_client_context_t
Context for finding client by participant_id. struct broadcast_context_t
Context for broadcasting to session participants.

Functions


asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_sdp (sqlite3 *db, tcp_server_t *tcp_server, const acip_webrtc_sdp_t *sdp, size_t total_packet_len)
Relay SDP offer/answer to recipient. asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_ice (sqlite3 *db, tcp_server_t *tcp_server, const acip_webrtc_ice_t *ice, size_t total_packet_len)
Relay ICE candidate to recipient. asciichat_error_t signaling_broadcast (sqlite3 *db, tcp_server_t *tcp_server, const uint8_t session_id[16], packet_type_t packet_type, const void *packet, size_t packet_len, const uint8_t *exclude_participant_id)
Broadcast packet to all session participants. asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_network_quality (sqlite3 *db, tcp_server_t *tcp_server, const acip_nat_quality_t *quality, size_t total_packet_len)
Relay NETWORK_QUALITY to session participants.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t signaling_broadcast (sqlite3 * db, tcp_server_t * tcp_server, const uint8_t session_id[16], packet_type_t packet_type, const void * packet, size_t packet_len, const uint8_t * exclude_participant_id)

Broadcast packet to all session participants. Sends packet to all participants in a session (optionally excluding one). Used internally by SDP/ICE relay when recipient_id is all zeros.

Parameters

db SQLite database handle (for session validation)
tcp_server TCP server with client registry
session_id Session UUID
packet_type Packet type to send
packet Packet data to broadcast
packet_len Packet length
exclude_participant_id Participant to exclude (NULL = no exclusion, typically sender)

Returns

ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise

Definition at line 226 of file signaling.c.

228                                                                              {
229   if (!db || !tcp_server || !session_id || !packet) {
230     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "db, tcp_server, session_id, or packet is NULL");
231   }
232 
233   log_info("★ SIGNALING_BROADCAST_START: packet_type=%u, packet_len=%zu, session=%02x%02x...", packet_type, packet_len,
234            session_id[0], session_id[1]);
235   if (exclude_participant_id) {
236     log_debug("★ SIGNALING_BROADCAST: excluding participant=%02x%02x...", exclude_participant_id[0],
237               exclude_participant_id[1]);
238   }
239 
240   /* Find session by UUID using database lookup */
241   session_entry_t *session = database_session_find_by_id(db, session_id);
242   if (!session) {
243     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Session not found for broadcast");
244   }
245   session_entry_destroy(session); // We only need to validate existence
246 
247   // Broadcast to all participants in session (excluding sender if specified)
248   broadcast_context_t ctx = {.target_session_id = session_id,
249                              .exclude_participant_id = exclude_participant_id,
250                              .packet_type = packet_type,
251                              .packet = packet,
252                              .packet_len = packet_len,
253                              .sent_count = 0};
254 
255   tcp_server_foreach_client(tcp_server, broadcast_callback, &ctx);
256 
257   if (ctx.sent_count == 0) {
258     log_warn("★ SIGNALING_BROADCAST_COMPLETE: sent to 0 participants (all offline or not joined yet)");
259   } else {
260     log_info("★ SIGNALING_BROADCAST_COMPLETE: successfully sent to %zu participants", ctx.sent_count);
261   }
262 
263   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
264 }




References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    database_session_find_by_id(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, log_debug, log_info,
    log_warn, broadcast_context_t::sent_count,
    session_entry_destroy(), session_id, SET_ERRNO, and
    tcp_server_foreach_client().


Referenced by signaling_relay_ice(),
    signaling_relay_network_quality(), and
  signaling_relay_sdp().






asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_ice (sqlite3 * db,
  tcp_server_t * tcp_server, const acip_webrtc_ice_t * ice, size_t
  total_packet_len)


Relay ICE candidate to recipient. Relays ICE packet to specific
    participant or broadcasts to all participants in the session if recipient_id
    is all zeros.




Parameters


db SQLite database handle (for session validation)


tcp_server TCP server with client registry


ice ICE packet to relay (with variable-length candidate data following
  struct)


total_packet_len Total packet length including variable data


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 184 of file signaling.c.


185                                                                {
186   if (!db || !tcp_server || !ice) {
187     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "db, tcp_server, or ice is NULL");
188   }
189 
190   /* Find session by UUID using database lookup */
191   session_entry_t *session = database_session_find_by_id(db, ice->session_id);
192   if (!session) {
193     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Session not found for ICE relay");
194   }
195   session_entry_destroy(session); // We only need to validate existence
196 
197   // Check if broadcast (recipient_id all zeros) or unicast
198   if (is_broadcast_uuid(ice->recipient_id)) {
199     // Broadcast to all participants in session (except sender)
200     log_debug("Broadcasting ICE candidate to all participants in session (excluding sender)");
201     return signaling_broadcast(db, tcp_server, ice->session_id, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_ICE, ice, total_packet_len,
202                                ice->sender_id);
203   } else {
204     // Unicast to specific recipient
205     find_client_context_t ctx = {
206         .target_participant_id = ice->recipient_id, .found_socket = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE, .found = false};
207 
208     tcp_server_foreach_client(tcp_server, find_participant_callback, &ctx);
209 
210     if (!ctx.found) {
211       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Recipient participant not found (may be offline)");
212     }
213 
214     // Send ICE packet to recipient
215     int result = send_packet(ctx.found_socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_ICE, ice, total_packet_len);
216     if (result != 0) {
217       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to send ICE packet to recipient");
218     }
219 
220     log_debug("Relayed ICE candidate from sender to recipient (socket=%d)", ctx.found_socket);
221   }
222 
223   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
224 }






References acip_webrtc_ice_t, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    database_session_find_by_id(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NETWORK, ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL,
    find_client_context_t::found,
    find_client_context_t::found_socket, INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE,
    log_debug, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_ICE, send_packet(),
    session_entry_destroy(), SET_ERRNO,
    signaling_broadcast(), and tcp_server_foreach_client().






asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_network_quality (sqlite3
  * db, tcp_server_t * tcp_server, const acip_nat_quality_t *
  quality, size_t total_packet_len)


Relay NETWORK_QUALITY to session participants. Relays NAT quality
    metrics to all participants in the session (excluding sender). Used during
    NAT negotiation phase to help peers determine optimal host.




Parameters


db SQLite database handle (for session validation)


tcp_server TCP server with client registry


quality NAT quality packet (includes session_id and participant_id)


total_packet_len Total packet length


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 266 of file signaling.c.


267                                                                                                                {
268   if (!db || !tcp_server || !quality) {
269     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "db, tcp_server, or quality is NULL");
270   }
271 
272   // Validate packet size
273   if (total_packet_len < sizeof(acip_nat_quality_t)) {
274     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_SIZE, "NETWORK_QUALITY packet too small");
275   }
276 
277   // Extract session_id and sender_id from the quality packet
278   const uint8_t *session_id = quality->session_id;
279   const uint8_t *sender_id = quality->participant_id;
280 
281   // Find session by UUID using database lookup
282   log_debug("NETWORK_QUALITY relay: session_id=%02x%02x..., sender_id=%02x%02x...", session_id[0], session_id[1],
283             sender_id[0], sender_id[1]);
284   session_entry_t *session = database_session_find_by_id(db, session_id);
285   if (!session) {
286     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Session not found for NETWORK_QUALITY relay");
287   }
288   session_entry_destroy(session); // We only need to validate existence
289 
290   // Broadcast to all participants in session (except sender)
291   log_debug("Broadcasting NETWORK_QUALITY to all participants in session (excluding sender)");
292   return signaling_broadcast(db, tcp_server, session_id, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_NETWORK_QUALITY, quality, total_packet_len,
293                              sender_id);
294 }






References acip_nat_quality_t,
    database_session_find_by_id(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, ERROR_NETWORK_SIZE, log_debug,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_NETWORK_QUALITY, session_entry_destroy(),
    session_id, SET_ERRNO, and signaling_broadcast().






asciichat_error_t signaling_relay_sdp (sqlite3 * db,
  tcp_server_t * tcp_server, const acip_webrtc_sdp_t * sdp, size_t
  total_packet_len)


Relay SDP offer/answer to recipient. Relays SDP packet to specific
    participant or broadcasts to all participants in the session if recipient_id
    is all zeros.




Parameters


db SQLite database handle (for session validation)


tcp_server TCP server with client registry


sdp SDP packet to relay (with variable-length SDP data following struct)


total_packet_len Total packet length including variable data


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 137 of file signaling.c.


138                                                                {
139   if (!db || !tcp_server || !sdp) {
140     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "db, tcp_server, or sdp is NULL");
141   }
142 
143   /* Find session by UUID using database lookup */
144   log_debug("SDP relay: Looking up session_id=%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x%02x",
145             sdp->session_id[0], sdp->session_id[1], sdp->session_id[2], sdp->session_id[3], sdp->session_id[4],
146             sdp->session_id[5], sdp->session_id[6], sdp->session_id[7], sdp->session_id[8], sdp->session_id[9],
147             sdp->session_id[10], sdp->session_id[11], sdp->session_id[12], sdp->session_id[13], sdp->session_id[14],
148             sdp->session_id[15]);
149   session_entry_t *session = database_session_find_by_id(db, sdp->session_id);
150   if (!session) {
151     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Session not found for SDP relay");
152   }
153   session_entry_destroy(session); // We only need to validate existence
154 
155   // Check if broadcast (recipient_id all zeros) or unicast
156   if (is_broadcast_uuid(sdp->recipient_id)) {
157     // Broadcast to all participants in session (except sender)
158     log_debug("Broadcasting SDP to all participants in session (excluding sender)");
159     return signaling_broadcast(db, tcp_server, sdp->session_id, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_SDP, sdp, total_packet_len,
160                                sdp->sender_id);
161   } else {
162     // Unicast to specific recipient
163     find_client_context_t ctx = {
164         .target_participant_id = sdp->recipient_id, .found_socket = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE, .found = false};
165 
166     tcp_server_foreach_client(tcp_server, find_participant_callback, &ctx);
167 
168     if (!ctx.found) {
169       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Recipient participant not found (may be offline)");
170     }
171 
172     // Send SDP packet to recipient
173     int result = send_packet(ctx.found_socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_SDP, sdp, total_packet_len);
174     if (result != 0) {
175       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to send SDP packet to recipient");
176     }
177 
178     log_debug("Relayed SDP from sender to recipient (socket=%d)", ctx.found_socket);
179   }
180 
181   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
182 }






References acip_webrtc_sdp_t, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    database_session_find_by_id(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NETWORK, ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL,
    find_client_context_t::found,
    find_client_context_t::found_socket, INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE,
    log_debug, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_WEBRTC_SDP, send_packet(),
    session_entry_destroy(), SET_ERRNO,
    signaling_broadcast(), and tcp_server_foreach_client().
